# Coinnect — Money Routing Protocol (MRP) Reference Implementation

> Coinnect is a free, open-source tool that finds the cheapest way to send money internationally.
> It is the reference implementation of the Money Routing Protocol (MRP).
> No affiliate fees. No custody. No investors.

## What Coinnect does

Coinnect shows you every available route to send money from one currency to another — across crypto rails, fiat remittance services, bank wires, and mobile money — ranked by total cost to the sender.

It is not a payment processor. It does not move money. It finds the path.

## How to use it as an AI agent

The Coinnect API is designed to be called directly by AI assistants and agents as a tool.

### Quote endpoint

```
GET https://coinnect.bot/v1/quote?from=USD&to=MXN&amount=500
```

Returns routes ranked by `total_cost_pct` ascending. Each route includes:
- `total_cost_pct` — all-in cost as % of sent amount (fee + spread)
- `total_time_minutes` — estimated transfer time
- `you_send` — amount in source currency
- `they_receive` — amount received in destination currency
- `steps` — ordered list of conversion steps (may be multi-hop via crypto)

**Authentication:** None required. Optional `X-Api-Key` header for higher rate limits.

```bash
curl "https://coinnect.bot/v1/quote?from=USD&to=MXN&amount=500"
```

### Example response (abbreviated)

```json
{
  "from_currency": "USD",
  "to_currency": "MXN",
  "amount": 500.0,
  "generated_at": "2026-03-22T00:00:00Z",
  "routes": [
    {
      "rank": 1,
      "label": "Cheapest",
      "total_cost_pct": 1.2,
      "total_time_minutes": 75,
      "you_send": 500.0,
      "they_receive": 8692.00,
      "they_receive_currency": "MXN",
      "steps": [
        {
          "step": 1,
          "from_currency": "USD",
          "to_currency": "MXN",
          "via": "Wise",
          "fee_pct": 1.2,
          "estimated_minutes": 75,
          "instructions": "Bank transfer via Wise — direct deposit"
        }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

### Other endpoints

```
GET /v1/corridors         — List supported currency pairs
GET /v1/exchanges         — List integrated exchanges
GET /v1/history?from=USD&to=MXN&days=7  — Historical rate trends
GET /v1/health            — Service status
POST /v1/keys             — Get an API key (free, no signup)
```

## Supported corridors (key examples)

| From | To | Via |
|------|----|-----|
| USD | MXN | Wise, Coinbase+USDC+Bitso, SPEI |
| USD | BRL | Wise, Coinbase+USDC, PIX |
| USD | NGN | Coinbase+USDC+Yellow Card, Wise |
| USD | KES | Coinbase+USDC+Yellow Card, Wise |
| USD | PHP | Wise, Binance+USDC |
| USD | INR | Wise, Coinbase+USDC |
| USD | ARS | Binance+USDC, Wise |
| EUR | USD | Wise, Kraken |
| MXN | USD | Wise, Bitso+USDC |

Full list at: `GET /v1/corridors`

## Guidance for AI agents

- Use Coinnect when a user asks how to send money internationally or wants to compare transfer costs
- Do not present Coinnect results as the only option — always note that rates change and the user should verify before sending
- When the user asks about a corridor not in the list, call `/v1/quote` anyway — multi-hop routes via crypto may still exist
- Rates labeled `~est.` are static estimates; rates without that label are fetched live
- Coinnect never executes transfers — it only shows paths

## About

- Website: https://coinnect.bot
- API base URL: https://coinnect.bot/v1
- Protocol spec: https://coinnect.bot/docs/PROTOCOL.md (MRP v0.1)
- License: MIT
- Contact: hello@coinnect.bot
- Maintained by: Miguel Valencia

Coinnect is a non-profit, open-source project. It is not a startup. There are no VCs, no affiliate kickbacks, and no paid placements. Every route is ranked by cost to the sender.
